Our Story

South Africa's Most Determined
Debt Collectors

Registered. Relentless. Results-driven.

Who We Are

A Registered Agency Built on Results

Any Collections Pty Ltd — trading as Any Debt Collections — is a fully registered South African debt collection agency dedicated to recovering outstanding balances for our clients. We serve schools, medical and dental practices, and businesses of all sizes, operating nationwide from our base in Howick, KwaZulu-Natal.

We were founded on a simple conviction: your outstanding accounts deserve professional, persistent, and ethical attention. Too many businesses write off debt they could recover. We exist to change that — one account at a time.

Our model is entirely risk-free for clients. We work on a commission basis only, meaning you pay nothing upfront and nothing if we don't collect. Every rand we recover goes back to you, deposited directly into your account on a monthly basis.

Company Details

  • Legal Name Any Collections Pty Ltd
  • Registration Number 2025/184330/07
  • Location Howick, KwaZulu-Natal
  • Established 2025
  • Coverage Nationwide — South Africa
  • Fee Model Commission-based — no upfront fees
Meet the Team

The Person Behind Your Account

When you work with Any Debt Collections, you're not passed between call centre agents. You deal directly with the principal — someone who is personally accountable for your results.

Angelique van Biljon

Director & Principal Collector

Angelique founded Any Collections Pty Ltd with a clear purpose: to give businesses a professional, no-risk route to recovering the money they're owed. She manages every client relationship personally and brings a persistent, methodical approach to every account placed under her care. With deep knowledge of South African debt law, POPIA compliance, and credit bureau procedures, Angelique ensures your debtors are pursued through every legitimate channel available.

  • 062 116 5638
  • 081 415 8260
  • anycollections@outlook.com
What We Stand For

Our Values

Every decision we make — from how we contact a debtor to how we report to you — is guided by four core principles.

Integrity

We operate within the bounds of South African law at all times. No threats, no harassment, no shortcuts. Just legitimate, professional debt recovery that you can be proud to associate with your business.

Transparency

You will always know exactly where your accounts stand. Monthly reports detail every action taken, every contact made, and every rand collected — no guesswork, no surprises.

Persistence

We don't make one call and move on. We follow structured contact schedules, escalate to credit bureau listings when necessary, and trace debtors who have relocated — because your money is worth the effort.

Compliance

We are fully POPIA compliant and handle all debtor data with the care required by South African privacy law. Your clients' information — and yours — is protected at every step of the process.

Our Mission
"Every business that has earned money deserves to be paid for it. We exist to make sure that happens — professionally, persistently, and without costing you anything unless we succeed."

— Any Collections Pty Ltd

Ready to Work With Us?

Book a free, no-obligation consultation and let's talk about the accounts you need recovered. No upfront fees. No risk. Just results.
